hero.subtitle: Building clean, functional, and modern web applications

about.title: My Approach
about.description1: I am a software developer committed to building high-quality digital experiences. I believe in transparency and focus on delivering practical, well-engineered solutions. My goal is to ensure that every project is technically sound and easy to maintain.
about.description2: With a background in .NET and a focus on modern Frontend development, I bridge the gap between back-end reliability and clean user interfaces. I enjoy working on projects where I can contribute to the full development cycle.

smartRepair.title: SMART REPAIR
smartRepair.description: A management system for repair services. Built with .NET 8 and React 19. I leveraged agentic workflows (Kilo Code) to ensure an optimized and clean codebase.

portfolio.title: Technical Portfolio
portfolio.description: A showcase of React 19 and TypeScript. This site demonstrates my focus on performance and type-safe UI patterns through dynamic CSS manipulation.

advergame.title: Kinect Interaction
advergame.description: Interactive system developed with C# and Unity. Bridging physical movement and digital 3D environments using computer vision for engaging experiences.

mobileGame.title: Accessible Design
mobileGame.description: Unity educational project for children with visual impairment. A practical exercise on how UX can be adapted to serve specific inclusive needs.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.description: Looking for a dedicated developer to help with your project? I’m open to new collaborations and I’ll give you an honest perspective on how we can work together.
